name: Goblin Ambush — Old Forest Road
dmNotes: Krag flees at half HP. Stealth DC 13 to spot the snare line before it springs.
scriptText: The road narrows beneath ancient oaks, their branches knitting out the last of the daylight. Birdsong thins, then stops entirely. {{music:ambush}} Shapes drop from the canopy — {{sfx:snarl}} — and a snarling voice barks from the brush: "Take the fat one alive!" {{image:art/krag.svg}} Steel rings out as the first goblin lunges. {{sfx:blade}}

ideas.text: Have one goblin break and flee toward the warren to raise the alarm
If the fight is too easy, Krag whistles up a worg from the treeline
A downed goblin can be questioned — it knows the warren's back entrance

entities.name: Krag the Vile
entities.note: Goblin boss. Flees at half HP toward the warren.

entities.name: Goblins (x4)
entities.note: Ambush from the canopy and brush

entities.name: Worg
entities.note: Optional reinforcement if the party is winning easily

entities.name: Snare line across the road
entities.note: Stealth DC 13 to notice; drops a net if triggered
